parsed_violation.message: Class declaration is missing an rdfs:comment.

llm_output.issue: Class declaration is missing an rdfs:comment.
llm_output.why_it_matters: A class declaration should have a comment to describe its purpose and scope.
llm_output.fix_rdf:
@prefix : <http://example.org/ontology#> .

:Entity a ve:Class ;	rdfs:comment "An entity is a thing that exists independently." .

parsed_violation.message: Class declaration is missing both foaf:page and foaf:isPrimaryTopicOf.

llm_output.issue: Class declaration is missing both foaf:page and foaf:isPrimaryTopicOf.
llm_output.why_it_matters: This shape ensures that class declarations are properly linked to their respective pages and topics, facilitating discovery and consistency across the ontology.
